    <item>

        <title>Wendell Carter: Scores season-high 28 points</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/wendell-carter-4407</link>
        <description>Carter finished Friday's 138-127 victory over the Mavericks with 28 points (8-16 FG, 2-3 3Pt, 10-10 FT), six rebounds and three assists across 36 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>

    <item>

        <title>Jalen Brunson: Posts double-double</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-brunson-4405</link>
        <description>Brunson notched 17 points (6-13 FG, 1-4 3Pt, 4-4 FT), one rebound and 10 assists over 30 minutes during Friday's 136-96 victory over the Bulls.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 03 Apr 2026 9:24:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>

        <title>Cody Williams: Strong line in loss to Houston</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cody-williams-6259</link>
        <description>Williams ended with 27 points (10-16 FG, 0-2 3Pt, 7-10 FT), 11 rebounds and four assists across 38 minutes during Friday's 140-106 loss to the Rockets.

    <item>

        <title>Cooper Flagg: Makes history in defeat</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cooper-flagg-6548</link>
        <description>Flagg finished Friday's 138-127 loss to the Magic with 51 points (19-30 FG, 6-9 3Pt, 7-7 FT), six rebounds, three assists, three steals and one block across 34 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>

    <item>

        <title>Kevin Durant: Paces Houston in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/kevin-durant-2811</link>
        <description>Durant recorded 25 points (8-12 FG, 2-4 3Pt, 7-8 FT), six assists, five rebounds and two blocks across 30 minutes in Friday's 140-106 win over the Jazz.
